title: Double Pixel Eyes
description: Give the babies double pixel eyes!
body:
# Double Pixel Eyes ## Give the babies double pixel eyes!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/double-pixel-eyes)




Baby mobs in Minecraft have only a single pixel for their eyes. This pack gives every baby mob proper double pixel eyes, matching the look of their adult counterparts!
